",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"Ubuntu 版本","items":[["Ubuntu 22.10 (kinetic)",{"release":"kinetic"}],["Ubuntu 21.10 (impish)",{"release":"impish"}],["Ubuntu 21.04 (hirsute)",{"release":"hirsute"}],["Ubuntu 20.10 (groovy)",{"release":"groovy"}],["Ubuntu 19.10 (eoan)",{"release":"eoan"}],["Ubuntu 19.04 (disco)",{"release":"disco"}],["Ubuntu 18.10 (cosmic)",{"release":"cosmic"}],["Ubuntu 17.10 (artful)",{"release":"artful"}],["Ubuntu 17.04 (zesty)",{"release":"zesty"}],["Ubuntu 16.10 (yakkety)",{"release":"yakkety"}],["Ubuntu 15.10 (wily)",{"release":"wily"}],["Ubuntu 15.04 (vivid)",{"release":"vivid"}],["Ubuntu 14.10 (utopic)",{"release":"utopic"}],["Ubuntu 13.10 (saucy)",{"release":"saucy"}],["Ubuntu 13.04 (raring)",{"release":"raring"}],["Ubuntu 12.10 (quantal)",{"release":"quantal"}],["Ubuntu 12.04 LTS (precise)",{"release":"precise"}],["Ubuntu 11.10 (oneiric)",{"release":"oneiric"}],["Ubuntu 11.04 (natty)",{"release":"natty"}],["Ubuntu 10.10 (maverick)",{"release":"maverick"}],["Ubuntu 10.04 LTS (lucid)",{"release":"lucid"}],["Ubuntu 9.10 (karmic)",{"release":"karmic"}],["Ubuntu 9.04 (jaunty)",{"release":"jaunty"}],["Ubuntu 8.10 (intrepid)",{"release":"intrepid"}],["Ubuntu 8.04 LTS (hardy)",{"release":"hardy"}],["Ubuntu 7.10 (gutsy)",{"release":"gutsy"}],["Ubuntu 7.04 (feisty)",{"release":"feisty"}],["Ubuntu 6.10 (edgy)",{"release":"edgy"}],["Ubuntu 6.06 LTS (dapper)",{"release":"dapper"}],["Ubuntu 5.10 (breezy)",{"release":"breezy"}],["Ubuntu 5.04 (hoary)",{"release":"hoary"}],["Ubuntu 4.10 (warty)",{"release":"warty"}]]},{"title":"启用源码源","note":"源码源通常用于构建和调试，开启后影响更新速度","name":"src","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":"","falseValue":"# "},{"title":"启用 proposed","name":"proposed","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":"","falseValue":"# "}],"templateId":"template-0","filepath":"/etc/apt/sources.list","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["更多版本代号可参考 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://wiki.ubuntu.com/Releases","rel":"nofollow","children":"https://wiki.ubuntu.com/Releases"}]]}],"

",["$r","p",null,{"children":["请前往 ",["$r","CodeInline",null,{"codeLanguage":true,"templateId":"template-1"}]," 下载。"]}],"
